evidence_summary: [CH017_SC001] Purpose: Establish the new objective and reveal the Wizard's true motivation.

[CH017_SC001] Summary: After three days of silence, Oz summons Dorothy. He proposes a journey via balloon to cross the desert but reveals his secret identity as a former circus performer. He expresses a desperate need to flee before his fraud is discovered.
[CH017_SC001] Emotional arc: From suspenseful waiting to revelation and shared desperation.
[CH017_SC001] Coverage: Two-shot: Dorothy and Oz discussing the plan. Close-ups: Oz's face during his confession/revelation. Medium shots: The scale of the Throne Room to emphasize isolation.
[CH017_SC001] Continuity: Oz's physical demeanor (transitioning from "Wizard" persona to "Humbug" performer).
